title: Exception group and base exception group should not be caught with 'except'
description: Catching exception group or base exception groups is discouraged, as it can lead to unintended behavior and obscure the source of errors.
message: Catching exception group or base exception groups is not recommended.
impact: Potential for unintended behavior and obscured error sources
recommendation: Use specific exception types in the 'except' blocks.

compliant.description: Catching specific exception types is recommended.

why_is_this_an_issue: Catching exception group or base exception groups can lead to unintended behavior and obscure the source of errors.
how_to_fix: Use specific exception types in the 'except' blocks.

metadata.title: Exception group and base exception group should not be caught with 'except'
